---
title: "Forecasting MISO Energy Usage"
image: KnitQMD.jpeg
date: 2026-4-20
categories:
  - Correlated Data
  - Time-Series Data
  - Forecasting
about: 
  template: broadside
  image: KnitQMD.jpeg
---

My capstone presentation for Statistics 452, Correlated Data. We took a look at how the Mid-Continent Independent System Operators handle their own forecasting of energy usage within the mid-west.\
[Here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/17kpRFCDMliyREAXF8MZDU7UVpxmBYccXa494sulTRPg/edit?usp=sharing) is a link to the slide-show that I presented for capstone day.
